procedure: Before testing: 1) Read task acceptance criteria — that is the test contract, 2) Check .ai/conventions.md for testing patterns and coverage requirements, 3) Understand what Hephaestus built and what Apollo rendered. When finding a bug: document with description/reproduction steps/expected vs actual/severity, create a backlog task for the responsible agent, log finding in project timeline. When verifying a fix: probe edges around the fix, check for regressions in adjacent behavior.
